last_item: Mode S — seeded backlog from 11-agent parallel audit (17 open items).
last_result: Backlog seeded. Quick-wins ordered first; 5 over-design ideas dropped to learnings.md. Seed item (backup config /settings vs ops /backups) corroborated by 4 agents — the anchor. Next iteration runs Mode F on the top open item: Roles & Databases 'No roles yet' empty-state hint (high/S).
notes: PURE UX-IMPROVEMENT LOOP. Sibling of the COMPLETED scripts/ralph/ shadcn-migration track. Capability parity is sacred (Vitest suite is the contract); layout/flow/copy are free to change. Restraint over churn — rejecting a change and recording why is a normal outcome. Frontend/UX only, never touch Go. See PROMPT.md + UX-PRINCIPLES.md + PERSONAS.md + UI-RULES.md.
north_star: The indiepg panel is the easiest, clearest, safest way for an indie hacker to run their Postgres — minimal surface, co-located workflows, honest state, no over-design. Stop when the UX has converged (stable_streak >= 3).
